label: Protein Protein Interface
description: The Mann, the myth, the legend, Carla

parameters.label: Parameter from the pre-flight checks as to whether this runs on the GPU or CPU
Input sequences selected from BV-BRC inputs
parameters.desc: Protein sequence(s) selected from BV-BRC for input to the protein-protein interaction predictor

parameters.label: A fasta file of protein sequences the user can upload from their computer for prediction
parameters.desc: Upload a protein fasta file with the sequence(s) for prediction

parameters.label: Feature groups
parameters.desc: Protein sequence(s) selected from BV-BRC for input to the protein-protein interaction predictor

parameters.label: A fasta file of protein sequences the user can upload from their computer for prediction
parameters.desc: Upload a protein fasta file with the sequence(s) for prediction

parameters.label: Score threshold for considering a residue to be binding. The default is tied to which model is chosen, but users can override.
parameters.desc: User defined threshold for a protein interaction to be considered valid.

parameters.label: Specify whether to do bipartite (2) vs tripartite (3) interaction; this should currently be locked to 2
Path to backend directory with the models. Pairs with pt_model which selects the models; users should not have input here.

parameters.desc: Name of the model the service invokes. This works with model_path.

parameters.label: This is the random seed for the transformers. Users should not have input.
parameters.desc: The random seed for transformers. This is set by python portion of the code.

parameters.label: Output Folder
parameters.desc: Path to which the output will be written. Defaults to the directory containing the input data.

parameters.label: File Basename
parameters.desc: Basename for the generated output files. Defaults to the basename of the input data.

parameters.label: Enable debug?
parameters.desc: If you wish debug statements to be printed for this job, enable this option.
